description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live or Archive game
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user pauses the game
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: "Pause, <Which half of inning + Inning>, <Away Team + Away Team Score>, <Home Team + Home Team Score>, Press select to Play.”

For example: "Pause, Top of the 3rd, Red Sox 2, Yankees 2, Press Select to Play"
